title: Agropyron brachypodioides
taxonomy: Agropyron brachypodioides is classified as a species of grass within the genus Agropyron and the family Poaceae. The genus Agropyron is a group of grasses commonly known as wheatgrasses. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other grass species. Agropyron brachypodioides is closely related to other species within the genus, such as Agropyron cristatum and Agropyron smithii.
